ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISPICKVAL( Closed_Won_Reason_2__c ,"Other") || ISPICKVAL( Closed_Won_Reason_2__c ,"Price") || ISPICKVAL( Closed_Won_Reason_Options_2__c ,"Countries") || ISPICKVAL( Closed_Won_Reason_Options_2__c ,"Other")) &&ISBLANK( Closed_Won_Reason_More_Details_2__c ) && $Profile.Name !="System Administrator" && $Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps" && NOT( ISCHANGED( Open_Activity_Count__c ) ) && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Closed Won Reason - More details are required.
